title: Book a free discovery call
description: We chat for 20 minutes about your current level, what you're studying or building, and exactly where the language wall is hitting you.

title: Get your custom tech-English plan
description: I build a coaching roadmap around your real material — your course docs, your tutorials, your job target. No generic lessons.

title: Practice, build, level up
description: Weekly 1-on-1 sessions with real-time feedback, working through actual docs, tutorials, and interview questions in English.
